# **Sprint Report 4- Cs Life** 

# Team Name: BitByte 

### Members: Marco Nasirpour, Nima Jamshidi, 

Adrian Lopez, Ethan Zarella,   
Saniha Sreedhara 

### Release 1.0, Release Date: 7/21/2026

### Revision: N/A, Revision Date: N/A 

**Actions to stop doing:** 

	The only thing the team needs to stop doing is coming to the meetings late, because sometimes we don’t start the meeting 5-10 minutes after the agreed meeting time. Although 10 minutes is not extremely long, it is still an inconvenience for the people that are in the meeting having to wait for everyone to come to the meeting. 

**Actions to start doing:** 

	The team needs to remind each other about meeting times so that we don’t forget or come late to the meetings. This is crucial as everyone in the team has different working schedules and bringing everyone together to discuss future plans and progress reports can be difficult. 

**Actions to keep doing:**

	The team has been very communicative through text messages and have made great progress finishing up every detail about the gameplay like finishing up the mini-games, events and graduation outcomes. These qualities have been strong for us throughout the quarter and have been successful every sprint. 

 

**Work completed/not completed:** 

* Completed User Stories:  
  * As a player, I want the ability to dedicate how much time I work and make some money.  
  * As a player, I want the ability to choose how I dedicate my time each quarter and those choices affect my statistics  
  * As a player, I want to play random mini-games in between the quarter  
  * As a player, I want random life events to occur in between the quarters   
  * As a player, I want an end game that has different graduation outcomes based on the choices and statistics gathered throughout college.   
* Incomplete User Stories:  
  * None\! All User Stories have been completed\!

**Work completion rate:** 

* Total number of user stories completed: 5 (US-1, US-2, US-3, US-4, US-5)  
* Total number of ideal work hours: 5 \+ 8 \+ 18 \+ 10 \+ 15 \= 56 hours total  
* Total number of days during sprint 4: 7 days (Wednesday July 15- Tuesday July 21\)   
* User Stories per day: 5 / 7 \= 0.714 user stories per day  
* Ideal work hours/days \= 56 / 7 \= 8 hours per day   
* Work Completion Rate (Sprints 1 \- 4):  
  * Average user stories per day: 13 / 28 \= 0.464 user stories per day  
  * Average Ideal work hours per day: 120 / 28 \= 4.286 OR 4 hours and 17 minutes per day  
* Final Sprint 4 Burn-up chart
